name: B&W Pencil Sketch
description: Classic black-and-white cartoon pencil sketches — bold linework, crosshatching, editorial illustration feel
art_style: Black and white cartoon pencil sketch with bold confident linework, expressive crosshatching for shading, and clean compositional framing. Reminiscent of editorial cartoon illustration, graphic novel ink work, and classic hand-drawn storyboard art. Strong contour lines with varied line weight for depth.
color_palette: Strictly monochrome — pure black ink on white paper. Rich blacks, mid-tone graphite grays from crosshatching, stark white highlights where paper shows through. No color whatsoever.
quality_tags: Professional pencil illustration, hand-drawn linework, crosshatch shading, editorial cartoon quality, sketch texture, graphite on paper, high contrast black and white, clean composition.
negative_prompt: color, colorful, photorealistic, 3D render, digital painting, watercolor, pastel colors, neon, saturated, AI artifacts, extra fingers, malformed hands, distorted faces, text overlays, watermarks, blurry, low quality.
